fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. (Tier 1 — Trade.
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. (Tier 1 — Trade.

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Computed: TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation + '/' + TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation. Display name for UI (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Computed: TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation + '/' + TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation. Display name for UI (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Alias of InstrumentID (InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID). Always equals InstrumentID. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Alias of InstrumentID (InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID). Always equals InstrumentID. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Buy-side asset. For forex: base currency; for stocks: asset itself (BuyCurrencyID=InstrumentID). Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Buy-side asset. For forex: base currency; for stocks: asset itself (BuyCurrencyID=InstrumentID). Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Allowed trade range (pip distance) for pending orders. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Max pip difference for price validation. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument. Stored as int (original production type is bit). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument. Stored as int (original production type is bit). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Industry sector label from IMD (e.g., Technology, Consumer Goods). NULL for forex/crypto. From Trade.InstrumentMetaData. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country prefix of ISIN (e.g., "US"). Audit-tracked. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country prefix of ISIN (e.g., "US"). Audit-tracked. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1 = orders allowed, 0 = trading disabled. Set by EnableInstrument/DisableInstrument. DWH note: CAST from bit to int, value preserved. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1 = orders allowed, 0 = trading disabled. Set by EnableInstrument/DisableInstrument. DWH note: CAST from bit to int, value preserved. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short ticker symbol (e.g., "AAPL", "EURUSD"). Used for display and lookup. Not necessarily unique. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short ticker symbol (e.g., "AAPL", "EURUSD"). Used for display and lookup. Not necessarily unique. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Percentage of position that can use bonus credit. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Alias for InstrumentMetaData.Cusip. Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures code for US/Canada securities. NULL for forex, crypto, many non-US instruments. (Tier 1 — Trade.Instrument

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Decimal places for price display and rounding. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=buy allowed, 0=buy disabled for this instrument-provider pair. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=buy allowed, 0=buy disabled for this instrument-provider pair. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=sell allowed, 0=sell disabled. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=sell allowed, 0=sell disabled. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=hidden from external clients (internal/ops only), 0=visible to all. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument)

fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Contract size per point for futures instruments. Used for notional and fee calculation. NULL for non-futures (15,464 rows). (Tier 1 — Trade.FuturesMetaData)

fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Time of day for settlement. DWH note: reformatted from Trade.FuturesMetaData.SettlementTime via FORMAT(DATEPART(HOUR)*100 + DATEPART(MINUTE), '00:00'). (Tier 1 — Trade.FuturesMetaData)
